name: Princess Castle Kids' Throw Blanket - The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™
description: Your child will feel like a princess as they snuggle up under this Princess Castle Kids' Throw Blanket from The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™. Made from recycled polyester knit fabric with recycled polyester backing, this throw blanket features a white princess castle silhouette with gold moon and star accents on a light blue backdrop. Great for tossing on their bed or armchair with other Disney-themed blankets and pillows, it'll help them stay warm and cozy as they read a book or get ready for bed.
